sections.title: 1. Information Collection
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly to us when using Nodes, such as when you create an account, create nodes, or communicate with us.

sections.title: 2. Use of Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, as well as to develop new features and protect our users.

sections.title: 3. Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect the security of your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

sections.title: 4. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using Nodes, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.

sections.title: 2. Use License
sections.content: We grant you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Nodes platform for your personal or internal business purposes in accordance with these Terms.

sections.title: 3. User Content
sections.content: You retain all rights to the content you create and store in Nodes. You are responsible for ensuring your content complies with applicable laws.

sections.title: 4. Disclaimer
sections.content: The materials in Nodes are provided on an 'as is' basis. We make no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaim and negate all other warranties including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Manage your neural profile visibility.
privacy.publicProfileDesc: Open your neural graph to the world. A public link allows anyone to see your active nodes and their stability.
privacy.publicLinkDesc: Your graph is available via link
privacy.slugHint: Only lowercase letters, numbers, _ and - (3–30 characters)
privacy.bioPlaceholder: Brief description of your life architecture...
privacy.coresPrivacyDesc: Public cores will be visible on the graph as centers of gravity.

delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete core "{{name}}"? This will also delete all connections with nodes.

manager.description: Select Connectors (tags) that this Core should unite. Nodes with these tags will automatically become part of its orbit.
manager.noNodes: No Nodes are attracted to this Core with current tags.

welcome.title: Welcome to NODES
